description: Part C different-field — .eq('id', slug) where URL-param slug is used to look up by id column (primary key) instead of slug column. Semantically a primary-key lookup is still a scoped query: each id belongs to exactly one tenant. MVP rule: accept ANY .eq whose arg is URL-param as sufficient, regardless of column name. Today emits service_role + .from() (id not in TENANT_DISCRIMINANTS); must NOT emit after Part C.
